name: LeaderLineAndParentObjectAlongPartPlacingType
summary: The LeaderLineAndParentObjectAlongPartPlacingType class defines a placing type that places the object with a leader line and rotated to be at the same angle as the connected part.

constructors.name: LeaderLineAndParentObjectAlongPartPlacingType
constructors.summary: Creates a new leader line and parent object along part placing type instance.
